title: TriageResponse
description: Structured output returned by the triage LLM call. The model MUST return exactly this shape; any deviation causes the router to fall back to the configured default dispatch target (per FR-009).

mode.description: The chosen dispatch target. MUST be one of the three non-inline targets. Confidence is attached to this field only (per FR-008).

confidence.description: Model's confidence in the chosen mode. Threshold-gated via TRIAGE_CONFIDENCE_THRESHOLD (default 1.0).

complexity.description: Coarse complexity estimate. Maps to maxTurns via the operator-configurable TRIAGE_MAXTURNS_{TRIVIAL,MODERATE,COMPLEX} env vars. Advisory only — never triggers fallback (per FR-008a).

rationale.description: One-sentence human-readable justification for mode + complexity. Surfaced in the user-visible tracking comment inside a collapsible <details> block (per FR-010).
